_comment: game-on-4090 profile for the studio (KeithUI). Loaded ONLY when KEITHVISION_PROFILE=game4090 (see Program.cs / tools/run-game-on-4090.ps1). You game on the 4090; LTX-2.3 video generates on the 5090, and the prompt-enhancer LLM runs on CPU (system RAM) so it takes no GPU VRAM. Audio stays on the 4090 (default) and lazy-starts on demand, staying resident once used.
